entries.title: Data Platform — Production Database Migration Plan (Draft)
verified_against: only the KnowledgeOS slice is dual-target (active postgres-compat-plan); legacy domains remain SQLite
entries.notes: Moved under data-platform/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24H. Aspirational all-domains SQLite to Postgres production migration plan. Only the KnowledgeOS slice is realized (active postgres-compat-plan); legacy domains still run SQLite. Future-facing -> draft.
